chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2118 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8416/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.6395/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 4. For hearing of main case 16.12.2025 Mr. Ather Ali Mirani, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
